zh.lifeSummary: 當John Morse於大約1452年出生在英國素福爾可史達科特 聖 瑪麗時，他的父親Robert Morse20歲，母親Margaret King Lady of Appleton17歲。他於大約1489年與Agnes Chickering在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1551年在英國享年100歲。

nameMeanings.name: Morse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Morris  .
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames, especially   Moses  . Compare   Morris  .
History: Samuel Morse (1791–1872), inventor of the electric telegraph andof Morse code, was a direct descendant of Anthony Morse of Wiltshire,England, who had emigrated to MA in 1635.

variants.name: Morss
meanings: English (Gloucestershire and London): variant of   Morse  .

variants.name: Morris
meanings: English and Scottish: from Maurice, an Old French personal name introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from Latin Mauritius, a derivative of Maurus (see Moore ). This was the name of several early Christian saints. In some cases it may be a nickname of the same derivation for someone with a swarthy complexion.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Muirghis, a variant of Ó Muirgheasa (see Morrissey ).

Welsh: Anglicized form of the personal name Meurig (from Latin Mauritius), which was gradually superseded in Wales by Morus, Morys, a derivative of the Anglo-Norman French form of the name (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Morse was born about 1452, in Stratford St Mary, Suffolk, England, his father, Robert Morse, was 20 and his mother, Margaret King Lady of Appleton, was 17. He married Agnes Chickering about 1489, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1551, in England, at the age of 100.

ko.Stratford St Mary, Suffolk, England, Uni: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스트라트퍼드 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: John Morse(이)가 대략 1452년 영국 수폴크 스트라트퍼드 스트 메리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Morse(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret King Lady of Appleton(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1489년 영국에서 Agnes Chickering(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1551년 영국에서 100세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Agnes Chickering aproximadamente 1489, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1551, em Inglaterra, com 100 anos.

ru.Stratford St Mary, Suffolk, England, Uni: стратфорд ст мэри, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Morse родился около 1452 г. в местности стратфорд ст мэри, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Morse было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret King Lady of Appleton, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Chickering около 1489 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1551 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 100 лет.
